name: PDF Summariser Agent
description: Reads PDF documents and returns structured summaries, key points, and action items. Supports multi-page PDFs up to 200 pages.

authSchemes.description: Pass your API key as a Bearer token

skills.name: Summarise PDF
skills.description: Takes a PDF URL or base64-encoded PDF and returns a structured summary with title, key points, and a short abstract.
examples: Give me the key points from this document

skills.name: Extract Action Items
skills.description: Scans a PDF for tasks, deadlines, and action items and returns them as a structured list.
examples: What are the action items in this meeting notes PDF?
